description_long: This is a red aluminum beverage can with the word 'Colix' prominently displayed in large white letters along the side, reminiscent of classic soda branding. The can features a wavy white stripe running vertically, adding a dynamic visual element to the design. On one side, there is a block of white text in a smaller font, likely describing the product, and a barcode is visible near the bottom. The top of the can is silver with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism. A circular QR code or similar graphic is present on the upper side of the can. The overall surface is smooth and glossy, typical of modern soft drink cans.
description: A red aluminum beverage can labeled 'Colix' with white branding, a wavy stripe, and a silver pull-tab top. The can features a barcode, product text, and a circular QR code graphic.
description_view_0: The can displays the large 'Colix' branding vertically with a wavy white stripe and part of the silver top visible.
description_view_1: This view shows the 'Colix' logo horizontally and a block of white product text, with the wavy stripe continuing along the side.
description_view_2: The can's side is mostly red with the wavy white stripe and a circular QR code graphic near the top.
description_view_3: This view highlights the barcode near the bottom, the circular QR code, and the edge of the 'Colix' logo.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large white 'Colix' text, wavy white stripe, block of white product text, barcode, and a circular QR code graphic on a red background.
